news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed PCBL Chemical Ltd's credit ratings at AA(Negative) and A1.
Ratings cover NCD, CP, term loans, and working capital, reflecting credit profile.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed PCBL Chemical Ltd's credit ratings at AA(Negative) and A1.
Ratings cover NCD, CP, term loans, and working capital, reflecting credit profile.

news.title: PCBL shares surged nearly 10% during trading.
news.summary: PCBL shares surged nearly 10% during trading.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd shared the audio link for its Q3 FY26 results call.
The call, held on 3rd Feb 2026, is accessible on the company's website.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd shared the audio link for its Q3 FY26 results call.
The call, held on 3rd Feb 2026, is accessible on the company's website.

news.title:
PCBL shares surged 13.6% despite a 98% YoY drop in Q3 net profit to ₹2 crore.
Revenue fell 8.2% YoY to ₹1,845 crore, with EBITDA down 32.7% and margins shrinking to 11.6%.
news.summary:
PCBL shares surged 13.6% despite a 98% YoY drop in Q3 net profit to ₹2 crore.
Revenue fell 8.2% YoY to ₹1,845 crore, with EBITDA down 32.7% and margins shrinking to 11.6%.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical reported Rs.1846 Cr revenue, Rs.231 Cr EBITDA.
Domestic Carbon Black sales rose 6% YoY; Specialty Black up 17% YoY.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical reported Rs.1846 Cr revenue, Rs.231 Cr EBITDA.
Domestic Carbon Black sales rose 6% YoY; Specialty Black up 17% YoY.

news.title: PCBL Chemical's Q3 revenue dropped to 18.5B rupees from 20B YoY.
news.summary: PCBL Chemical's Q3 revenue dropped to 18.5B rupees from 20B YoY.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd's subsidiary started Line 4 production on 28.01.2026, adding 60,000 MT capacity.
Current capacity is 1,47,000 MTPA with 87% utilization; expansion targets rising demand.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd's subsidiary started Line 4 production on 28.01.2026, adding 60,000 MT capacity.
Current capacity is 1,47,000 MTPA with 87% utilization; expansion targets rising demand.

news.title:
Crisil Ratings reaffirmed PCBL Chemical Ltd's credit rating at Crisil AA Negative for Rs 800 crore term loans.
The rating indicates stable credit quality but with a negative outlook.
news.summary:
Crisil Ratings reaffirmed PCBL Chemical Ltd's credit rating at Crisil AA Negative for Rs 800 crore term loans.
The rating indicates stable credit quality but with a negative outlook.

news.title:
Indian chemical companies are expanding into batteries and semiconductors, driven by clean energy and EV trends, creating new material demands.
PCBL, Neogen Chemicals, Balaji Amines, Acutaas, Archean Chemicals, and Stallion India are innovating in battery and semiconductor supply chains.
news.summary:
Indian chemical companies are expanding into batteries and semiconductors, driven by clean energy and EV trends, creating new material demands.
PCBL, Neogen Chemicals, Balaji Amines, Acutaas, Archean Chemicals, and Stallion India are innovating in battery and semiconductor supply chains.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd appoints Mr. Sanjay Prabhakar Ghawghawe as Chief Manufacturing Operations Executive Director from 5th Jan 2026.
Mr. Sanjay brings 29 years of experience, including roles at Pidilite, Owens Brockway, HUL, and Reliance Petro Marketing.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd appoints Mr. Sanjay Prabhakar Ghawghawe as Chief Manufacturing Operations Executive Director from 5th Jan 2026.
Mr. Sanjay brings 29 years of experience, including roles at Pidilite, Owens Brockway, HUL, and Reliance Petro Marketing.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd faces Rs 10,000 penalty under GST Act, waiving Rs 1.77 lakh tax liability.
Penalty imposed due to address mismatch; no material financial impact evaluated by the company.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd faces Rs 10,000 penalty under GST Act, waiving Rs 1.77 lakh tax liability.
Penalty imposed due to address mismatch; no material financial impact evaluated by the company.

news.title:
Rainbow Investments acquired PCBL shares through warrants conversion at Rs. 280/share.
Each warrant exercised led to 1 equity share, face value Re. 1.
news.summary:
Rainbow Investments acquired PCBL shares through warrants conversion at Rs. 280/share.
Each warrant exercised led to 1 equity share, face value Re. 1.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical's promoter group converted warrants to equity at Rs. 280/share.
Shares were issued preferentially, complying with SEBI insider trading rules.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical's promoter group converted warrants to equity at Rs. 280/share.
Shares were issued preferentially, complying with SEBI insider trading rules.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd issued Rs.100 crore commercial papers with a 6.2% discount rate, maturing on Feb 4, 2026.
The unsecured papers were allotted to Kotak Mahindra Bank, with Yes Bank as IPA; no special rights attached.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd issued Rs.100 crore commercial papers with a 6.2% discount rate, maturing on Feb 4, 2026.
The unsecured papers were allotted to Kotak Mahindra Bank, with Yes Bank as IPA; no special rights attached.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd appoints Nilesh Koul as MD for five years after Kaushik Roy's resignation.
Koul brings prior experience from Hindalco to his new leadership role at PCBL.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd appoints Nilesh Koul as MD for five years after Kaushik Roy's resignation.
Koul brings prior experience from Hindalco to his new leadership role at PCBL.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd's Q2 saw growth in carbon black volumes and capacity utilization.
Margins impacted by pricing pressure, US tariffs; specialty segment showed margin improvement.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd's Q2 saw growth in carbon black volumes and capacity utilization.
Margins impacted by pricing pressure, US tariffs; specialty segment showed margin improvement.

news.title:
PCBL Chem advances specialty & battery chemicals with new Gujarat lines.
Reports 5% QoQ volume growth; targets FY28 global capacity of 1.5 Mn TPA.
news.summary:
PCBL Chem advances specialty & battery chemicals with new Gujarat lines.
Reports 5% QoQ volume growth; targets FY28 global capacity of 1.5 Mn TPA.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd targets a 50% capacity expansion by FY27.
Focus areas include conductive carbon black and nano silicon innovation.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd targets a 50% capacity expansion by FY27.
Focus areas include conductive carbon black and nano silicon innovation.

news.title:
PCBL Chemical Ltd reported Q2FY26 consolidated revenue of Rs. 2,164 Cr and EBITDA of Rs. 278 Cr, with a 5% QoQ increase in Carbon Black sales volume.
Specialty Black sales grew 9% QoQ; new production lines in Gujarat and TN expected by Q3FY26. Patent milestones achieved in nanomaterials and battery-grade graphite.
news.summary:
PCBL Chemical Ltd reported Q2FY26 consolidated revenue of Rs. 2,164 Cr and EBITDA of Rs. 278 Cr, with a 5% QoQ increase in Carbon Black sales volume.
Specialty Black sales grew 9% QoQ; new production lines in Gujarat and TN expected by Q3FY26. Patent milestones achieved in nanomaterials and battery-grade graphite.

news.title: PCBL Chemical reports Q2 revenue of 21.6B rupees, unchanged YoY.
news.summary: PCBL Chemical reports Q2 revenue of 21.6B rupees, unchanged YoY.
